query:
CREATE TABLE `contact_messages` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`name` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
	`email` varchar(320) NOT NULL,
	`phone` varchar(32),
	`subject` varchar(256),
	`message` text NOT NULL,
	`productId` int,
	`read` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `contact_messages_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
ALTER TABLE `contact_messages` ADD CONSTRAINT `contact_messages_productId_products_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`productId`) REFERENCES `products`(`id`) ON DELETE no action ON UPDATE no action;
ALTER TABLE `products` ADD CONSTRAINT `products_categoryId_categories_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`categoryId`) REFERENCES `categories`(`id`) ON DELETE no action ON UPDATE no action
